root_cause: Variable `random_val` was undeclared in the testbench module, and the `calculate_golden` function was incomplete/truncated with missing end and proper declarations.
fix_rule: Declare all variables before use and ensure functions are complete with proper begin/end and port declarations. For testbench code, always declare the variable at module level (e.g., `reg signed [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] random_val;`) before referencing it in procedural blocks.
